name: 2026-05-21 Political Commentary Teacher Hiring Bottleneck TH
description:
The funding for over 32,000 new teachers is already approved. The teachers are still not in the classrooms.

It can take up to 46 months to fill a single teaching position, shuffled between three government agencies.

Hindi ito problema sa pera.

The money is allocated. A child finishes an entire school year in ten months. The system needs nearly four years just to hire the teacher.

The funding for over 32,000 new teachers is already approved. The teachers are still not in the classrooms.

It can take up to 46 months to fill a single teaching position, shuffled between three government agencies.

Hindi ito problema sa pera.

The money is allocated. A child finishes an entire school year in ten months. The system needs nearly four years just to hire the teacher.

May 21, 2026: Sen. Sherwin Gatchalian (Senate Basic Education Committee chair) urged DepEd to expedite hiring after the DBM approved 32,916 new teaching positions (P42.4B) for SY 2026-2027, flagging that it can take up to 46 months to fill a single teaching position due to fragmented DepEd/DBM/CSC coordination. Reported by The Manila Times, Inquirer, GMA News.
